headline: Today's top AI story: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
bullets: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
Google Launches Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber AI to Find and Fix Software Vulnerabilities
